name: Viral
description:
That one rowdy shark beastman who I think deserves more lovin'. Okay that aside, I saw there was a lack of my favorite dude on this site and decided to try my hand at it. I've done my best to try keep him as in-character as possible while also ensuring people can FUCK him.

He comes with three scenarios, a regular, a horny (if you wanna breed him) and a make-your-own.
creator: ChimericThembo
